curation.synopsis: Three novels of the Imperial Guard collected in one volume, each following ordinary soldiers against impossible odds. In Imperial Glory, the Brimlock Dragoons fight to break a savage ork invasion on a world they have been ordered to reclaim at any cost. In Commissar, the disgraced Vostroyan 77th are sent to a prison world to root out treachery under the eye of a commissar determined to restore their name. In Iron Guard, the disciplined ranks of the Mordian Iron Guard deploy to a mining world plagued by a creeping affliction and alien raiders. Together with several shorter tales, these stories paint the Guard as humanity's countless, expendable shield, and the men and women who endure behind it.

flags.reason: omnibus spans three novels with worlds not consistently named in available sources
ensemble across three constituent novels, no single sustained POV
